zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Walcott於1295年出生在英國時，他的父親Alexander de Walcott II31歲，母親de Walcott I21歲。他於大約1332年與Millicent de Gunton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年之後在英國諾福爾可君頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Walcott于1295年出生在英国时，他的父亲Alexander de Walcott II31岁，母亲de Walcott I21岁。他于大约1332年与Millicent de Gunton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年之后在英国諾福爾可君頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Walcott, Walcot, or Walcote, for example in Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire, all named in Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala) + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’ (plural cotu), i.e. ‘the cottage where the (Welsh-speaking) Britons lived’. This name is also frequent in Barbados and Jamaica, when emancipated slaves adopted it from the name of one or other of the sugar plantations owned there by English families called Walcott.
History: This surname was in MA from an early date. William Walcott emigrated from England to Salem, MA, in 1637; John Wolcott (1632–1690) is recorded in Springfield, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Walcott was born in 1295, in England, his father, Alexander de Walcott II, was 31 and his mother, de Walcott I, was 21. He married Millicent de Gunton about 1332, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1356, in Gunton, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Walcott est né en 1295, à Angleterre, son père, Alexander de Walcott II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, de Walcott I, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Millicent de Gunton environ 1332, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1356, à Gunton, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Walcott 1295 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander de Walcott II 31 und seine Mutter de Walcott I 21. Er hat um 1332 in England Millicent de Gunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1356 in Gunton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Walcott è nato il nel 1295 nel England, il suo padre, Alexander de Walcott II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, de Walcott I, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Millicent de Gunton circa 1332, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1356, nel Gunton, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Walcottが1295年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Alexander de Walcott IIは31歳，母de Walcott Iは21歳であった。約1332年にイギリスでMillicent de Guntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年以後にイギリスノーフォルクグントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Walcott(이)가 1295년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Walcott II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 de Walcott I(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1332년 영국에서 Millicent de Gunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 이후 영국 노르폴크 건턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Walcott nasceu em 1295, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander de Walcott II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, de Walcott I, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent de Gunton aproximadamente 1332, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1356, em Gunton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Walcott родился в 1295 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander de Walcott II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали de Walcott I, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent de Gunton около 1332 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1356 г. в местности гунтон, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Walcott nació en 1295, en Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander de Walcott II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, de Walcott I, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Millicent de Gunton aproximadamente 1332, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1356, en Gunton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
